notes: Ondo product economics may accrue through product-holder yield, issuer/operator fees, spreads, expenses, or service revenue, but no documented offchain value-accrual flow to ONDO holders was identified.

evidence.name: Ondo Product Economics
evidence.summary: Ondo products have documented product-level economics, including yield, fees, expenses, and spreads. These mechanics describe product economics, not ONDO-holder accrual. No onchain mechanism guarantees that residual issuer/operator economics flow to ONDO holders.

evidence.name: Global Markets Revenue
evidence.summary: Global Markets documentation describes fees and quote spreads retained by Ondo Global Markets. Aragon did not identify a mechanism routing those fees or spreads to ONDO holders or an ONDO-controlled treasury.
